summary: Testing completed for Iteration 47 Features: POS redesign, Store Management, Pricing Page, Sound Settings. All backend APIs working (12/12 tests passed). All UI pages verified.
critical_code_review_comments: POS Page redesigned successfully with 3-column layout: left sidebar (task menu), center products table, right sidebar (20 product shortcuts)
Store Management page has proper tabs (Settings, Products, Orders) with COD and delivery configuration
Sound Settings tab in Settings page has all required toggles and test/save buttons with proper data-testid attributes
Pricing page displays plans from /api/saas/plans/public with monthly/yearly toggle and Arabic/French language support
seed_data_creation: Test user created: test@test.com with password test123. Test store settings were updated during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 47 features verified successfully: 1) POS page redesigned with left sidebar (task menu with keyboard shortcuts Ctrl+0-9), center table, right sidebar (20 product shortcut buttons), 2) Store Management page (/store) with enable toggle, basic info, design, contact info, delivery & payment settings including COD, 3) Sound Settings tab in Settings page with master toggle, individual sound toggles (sale/error/notification/scan), volume slider, test and save buttons, 4) Public Pricing page (/pricing) with monthly/yearly billing toggle, 3-5 plans showing features and prices, language switcher (AR/FR), 5) Backend APIs: GET/PUT /api/store/settings, GET /api/store/products, GET /api/store/orders, GET /api/saas/plans/public all working correctly.

elements_verified: Left sidebar with task menu (10 items with keyboard shortcuts)
Center products table with columns (الكود, اسم المنتج, الكمية, عبوة, السعر, خصم%, المبلغ HT, ض.ق.م)
Right sidebar with 20 product shortcut buttons
Header with sale code (BV0001/26) and total display
Session warning banner when no open session
Design section with logo URL and primary color picker
Contact info section with phone, hours, address
Delivery & Payment section with COD toggle
